feedback.summary: Implementation structurally sound with strong TanStack API compliance (AC-001~AC-007). Single blocker: ADR file missing for xlsx peerDependency addition (C-20). Auto-fix recommended: generate decisions/MOD-GRID-06-decisions.md with ADR-MOD-GRID-06-001 (xlsx selection rationale + 2+ alternatives + trade-offs).
strengths: Perfect API signature match spec Section 2.2 (exportToExcel<TData> exact)
Comprehensive GroupColumnDef + merge cells handling (AC-003) with isPlaceholder + colSpan logic
Clean internal helper architecture (getRowsByScope, buildHeaderRows) with proper scope handling
Zero any-type, zero Wijmo, zero mock data — code quality excellent
tsc 0 errors both package + framework integration (B-01)
blockers: E-02 NO: ADR missing. Required actions: (1) Create D:\project\topvel_project\TOMIS\.claude\tw-grid\decisions\MOD-GRID-06-decisions.md. (2) Write ADR-MOD-GRID-06-001 with: decision statement (xlsx adoption), rationale, alternatives (exceljs, sheetjs-ce, native CSV), 2+ trade-offs, license confirmation (Apache-2.0/MIT), bundle impact note. (3) Re-run implement-coverage after ADR added.
minorFindings: C-25 public API docs (JSDoc + Docusaurus + Storybook) deferred to verify stage per spec Section 12
Test execution (A-07) N/A — no tests specified in Section 7; package.json 'test' field is placeholder
F-06 N/A valid — spec code is pseudocode reference, no Rules of Hooks or structural defects
